NewsID.description: The unique ID assigned to this news story

Source.description: The source of the story (RotoBaller, NBCSports.com, etc.)

Updated.description: The timestamp of when this news story was published

TimeAgo.description: A description of how long ago this content was published

Title.description: The brief title of the news story (typically less than 100 characters)

Content.description: The entirety of the content of the news story

Url.description: The website URL of the full news story

TermsOfUse.description: The terms of use with using this news item, credit must be given to the originator of the story when specified in the terms of use

Categories.description: Comma delimited meta tags describing the categories of this content. Possible tags include: Top Headlines, Breaking News, Injury, Sit/Start, Waiver Wire, Risers, Fallers, Lineups, Transactions, Free Agents, Prospects/Rookies, Game Recap, Matchup Outlook

PlayerID.description: The player's unique PlayerID as assigned by SportsDataIO. Note: this ID will stay with the player throughout their MLB career

TeamID.description: The team's unique TeamID as assigned by SportsDataIO

Team.description: The abbreviation [Key] of the team that relates to this story

PlayerID2.description: The PlayerID of the player who relates to this story

TeamID2.description: The TeamID of the second team that relates to this story

Team2.description: The abbreviation [Key] of the second team that relates to this story

OriginalSource.description: The original source who broke this news (before it was picked up by the publisher of this story)

OriginalSourceUrl.description: The URL of the original source who broke this news story
